episodes.title: My Family Joined a Cult in New Zealand (and There's a Documentary) | Feral Wisdom Ep. 32
episodes.description: We finally got the equipment working (after 3 hours of chaos) and we had A LOT to cover. This week on Feral Wisdom: 🐾 Our most chaotic setup yet — nothing worked, we don't care🕵️ Justine reveals she has family living in a cult in New Zealand — and there's a documentary⚰️ The Coffin Crasher business idea: get paid $500 to cry at a stranger's funeral and leave in a limo☕ Our 90s hip hop ice coffee van startup pitch💊 An honest conversation about mental health, medication, and the loneliness spiral Listen wherever you get podcasts. Timeline:0:00 – Intro & 3 hours of technical chaos5:46 – Family in a cult reveal7:24 – What even is the legal definition of a cult?11:03 – The Coffin Crasher business idea16:60 – Ice coffee van that bumps 90s hip hop25:54 – Mental health check-in & starting medication30:12 – Celebrity sex tapes: why don't they exist anymore?35:56 – AI data centers explained (kind of)44:29 – Outro moms, canadian, best friends, feral wisdom podcast, feral wisdom, podcast, canadian podcast, women podcast, comedy podcast, true crime podcast, cult documentary, cult survivor, cult stories, new zealand cult, gloria vale, family cult, coffin crasher, funeral crasher, funny business ideas, weird business ideas, ice coffee van, mental health podcast, mental health awareness, depression medication, anxiety podcast, antidepressants, men's mental health, celebrity sex tapes, kim kardashian, AI data centers, nvidia stock, robot vacuum, roomba fail, willie pickton, true crime canada, vancouver podcast, podcast highlights, podcast clips, best podcast moments, funny podcast moments, relatable podcast, girls podcast, best friends podcast, two girls podcast, chaotic podcast, podcast 2024, podcast 2025, feral wisdom ep 32, episode 32, podcast timestamps, youtube podcast, full episode podcast
